notes: loginCode is DERIVED — do not store as password; recompute from fullName/nickname/birthDate on login.
Deceased persons have loginCode=null and cannot authenticate.
Default religion for deceased without explicit religion is islam (FE helper).
IDs are stable string slugs from FE mock — keep as-is or map to UUID with a lookup table.
